content: Small interaction polish after the routing hardening: zone/subgraph/abstraction areas still click to collapse/expand when unlocked, but when the expansion lock is enabled those same areas are now valid pan-grab surfaces for the 2D SVG canvas. The pan/zoom guard checks the live archmap-abstraction-locked class before suppressing drags, and locked interactive areas show a grab cursor instead of looking clickable. Verification: npm test -- --run test/interaction.test.ts test/render.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build. Existing untracked reports/ left untouched.
